rationale.fidelity: Directly diagnoses the leaked future demand and restores nonnegative ex ante allocation, fixed inventory, no recourse, and expected shortage-leftover cost.
rationale.managerial_framing: The actor, timing, feasible decision, consequences, and objective are concrete, but the allocation trade-off and explicit alternative allocation are only implicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly positioning is requested or claimed.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Clearly labels the joint distribution as an assumption and excludes advance realized-demand knowledge and post-demand rebalancing.
rationale.overall: Excellent unavailable-information diagnosis with no hard failure; the only material deduction is for limited development of the managerial allocation tension.
